subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from Bahá unto him who hath believed in God, the Creator of all things, that he may be mindful of that which hath been sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدی البهاء الی الذی آمن بالله خالق الاشیا لیکون متذکرا بما نزل من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
